source_of_truth: Ported verbatim from brain_researcher services/shared/session_lessons.py (functions classify_session + extract_session_lessons). Patterns are case-insensitive Python regular expressions applied with re.search.
notes: This file is the auditable rule kernel. scripts/session_heuristics.py loads it and applies the patterns; edit a pattern here and the classifier behavior changes deterministically.
risk_labels is the closed, canonical open-risk vocabulary returned by session_risk_classify. Any open item that matches no pattern falls back to 'pre-existing-debt'.
Regex escapes are JSON-escaped (a literal backslash is written as two characters). scripts compile these with re.IGNORECASE.

open_risk_patterns.label: partial-validation
open_risk_patterns.pattern: \b(no tests|not run|not verified|unverified|manual verification|partial validation|smoke .*not|full .*not run|coverage .*missing)\b

open_risk_patterns.label: scientific-method-gap
open_risk_patterns.pattern: \b(null|weak effect|non-significant|confound|label|granularity|methodological|atlas|query-based seed|outer harness|raw data|ibma|blocked asset|gate remains blocked)\b

validation_evidence_patterns.pattern: \b(BR plan_preflight|BR audit verified|Wrote RUN_SUMMARY|coordinate count|space consistency|coordinate_table\.csv|included_studies\.csv|Generated ALE maps|metrics\.json|provenance_manifest\.json|spatial_report\.md)\b
\b(pdf rendered|rendered PDF|rerendered|LaTeX log|pdftotext|pdfinfo|md5 parity|compiled PDF|rebuilt .*\.pdf|no LaTeX errors|no fatal)\b

prod_evidence_regex: \b(rollout status|rolled out|deployed|image tag|docker\.io|kubectl|deployment image|tools/list|live MCP|MCP transport|verified prod|/api/health|health endpoint|browser smoke|api smoke|public health|200)\b

hygiene_checks.message: Session has no final write_session_snapshot closeout.
Open items contain vague none-style placeholders.
hygiene_checks.when: any open item lowercases to a value in vague_open_values

hygiene_checks.message: Session is closed as succeeded but no concrete validation evidence was detected in done/open items.
hygiene_checks.when: status == 'succeeded' AND has_snapshot is true AND validation_evidence is empty

hygiene_checks.message: Prod/runtime-like task lacks detected rollout or health evidence.
hygiene_checks.when: prod_task_regex matches the digest text AND prod_evidence_regex does NOT match the done+open text

lesson_map.missing_final_snapshot: Close completed BR work with one final session snapshot.
lesson_map.missing_source_client: Pass source_client so client-specific agent behavior is auditable.
lesson_map.succeeded_without_validation_evidence: Pair succeeded closeout with concrete validation evidence.
lesson_map.prod_without_rollout_health_evidence: Prod/runtime handoffs need rollout and health evidence.
lesson_map.vague_open_none: Use explicit open-risk labels instead of vague none placeholders.
